---
title: "Background Tasks (Reminders, Reports)"
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Feature
Add support for background tasks (e.g., sending reminders, generating reports) using a task queue like Celery or RQ.

## Why
Automates routine tasks and improves user engagement.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Reminders sent before activities
- Reports generated on schedule
- Background jobs do not block main app
